body:
Fixes #15

## Summary
- Version release artifact filenames across Electron Builder config and the release workflow, for example `vk-bot-desktop-macos-arm64-0.9.8.dmg`.
- Add Linux and Windows arm64 release jobs alongside existing x64 builds, with exact release completeness validation before publishing.
- Update the download page to resolve versioned assets from GitHub Release metadata, keep fallback links for already-published legacy assets, and add macOS zip rows.
- Add regular and advanced verification sections covering SHA-256 checksums, build provenance, and GitHub artifact attestations.
- Wrap the application screenshot in an OS-styled window frame and add desktop/mobile screenshots for review.
- Capture issue data, release evidence, CI logs, sources, root cause analysis, and implementation notes in `docs/case-studies/issue-15/README.md`.

## Reproduction Evidence
The captured latest release before the fix was `v0.9.7` from `2026-05-10`, which published unversioned desktop assets such as `vk-bot-desktop-macos-arm64.dmg` and did not include Linux or Windows arm64 binaries. Evidence is preserved under `docs/case-studies/issue-15/data`.

## Verification
- `npm test`
- `npm run lint` completed with the existing `src/bot/runner.js` complexity warning.
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm run check:duplication`
- `npm run build:site`
- `npm run test:pages:e2e -- --site-dir site/dist`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh`
- `node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs`
- `npx --yes -p secretlint -p @secretlint/secretlint-rule-preset-recommend secretlint "**/*"`

`git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` was also inspected and only reports trailing whitespace inside the preserved raw CI log fixture at `docs/case-studies/issue-15/ci-logs/checks-and-release-25634091107.log`.

## Screenshots
![Desktop download page](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-15-9ea339e71924/docs/screenshots/issue-15-download-page-desktop.png?raw=true)

![Mobile download page](https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-15-9ea339e71924/docs/screenshots/issue-15-download-page-mobile.png?raw=true)

## References
The case study cites the official sources used for the release and verification decisions, including Electron Builder artifact macros, GitHub hosted runner labels, GitHub artifact attestations, Microsoft `Get-FileHash`, GNU `sha256sum`, and Reproducible Builds documentation.
title: Version desktop release downloads and verification page
